# QA Plan: Sprint 2 — Core A "Carro na Tela"

**Date**: 2026-06-26
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 42 stories across 6 systems (Telemetry, Dev Tools, Input, Asset Manager, Physics, Camera)
**Engine**: Babylon.js 9.12.0
**Sprint File**: production/sprints/sprint-02.md

## Automated Tests Required

### Telemetry (6 stories — 5 Logic, 1 Integration)

**Test directory**: `tests/unit/telemetry/`

All telemetry stories are pure TypeScript (no Babylon.js dependency). Unit tests with Vitest.

- **T-001 Data Model**: Test data structure creation, field defaults, type constraints
- **T-002 Sampling Loop**: Test sampling interval, data accumulation, tick behavior
- **T-003 Console Summary**: Test summary formatting, output structure
- **T-004 JSON Export**: Test JSON serialization, export format, edge cases (empty data)
- **T-005 Race Lifecycle**: Test start/stop/reset lifecycle, data persistence across race phases
- **T-006 Noop Behavior**: Test that noop mode produces zero side effects

**Estimated test count**: ~60-80 unit tests

### Dev Tools (8 stories — 2 Logic, 5 Integration, 1 UI)

**Test directory**: `tests/unit/dev-tools/`

Dev Tools overlay is DOM-based (HTML overlay). Tests verify state management and data flow, not visual output.

- **DT-001 Compile Guard**: Test `import.meta.env.DEV` flag detection, guard behavior
- **DT-002 Input Keybinds**: Test keybind registration, mapping, override
- **DT-003 HTML Overlay** (UI): Manual verification — overlay renders, tabs switch, data updates
- **DT-004 Config Tree**: Test tree traversal, namespace display, value formatting
- **DT-005 Event Bus Inspector**: Test event capture, handler listing, emission history
- **DT-006 GSM Visualizer**: Test state display, transition history, current state
- **DT-007 Sim Snapshot Panel**: Test snapshot display, hash comparison, diff view
- **DT-008 AI Telemetry Tab**: Test telemetry data display, refresh cycle

**Estimated test count**: ~70-90 unit tests

### Input (7 stories — 2 Logic, 5 Integration)

**Test directory**: `tests/unit/input/`

Input system is pure TypeScript (gamepad/keyboard polling). No Babylon.js dependency.

- **IN-001 Interface Types**: Test InputState type definition, ZERO constant, field defaults
- **IN-002 Dead Zone Formula**: Test dead zone calculation, threshold behavior, edge values
- **IN-003 Input Polling**: Test polling cycle, device detection, state capture
- **IN-004 Focus Safety**: Test focus loss behavior, reconnect handling, state reset
- **IN-005 GSM Integration**: Test GSM state mapping, input enable/disable per state
- **IN-006 Debounce**: Test debounce timing, edge cases (rapid fire, held keys)
- **IN-007 Device Detection**: Test device enumeration, hot-plug detection

**Estimated test count**: ~80-100 unit tests

### Asset Manager (6 stories — 1 Logic, 5 Integration)

**Test directory**: `tests/unit/asset-manager/`

Asset Manager wraps Babylon.js AssetContainer API. Tests mock scene/container objects.

- **AM-001 Init Two-Scene**: Test init creates cache, stores scene references, setActiveScene routing
- **AM-002 Load Cache**: Test cache hit/miss, container instantiation, memory budget
- **AM-003 Loading Events**: Test loading progress events, completion callbacks, error events
- **AM-004 Unload/Dispose**: Test container disposal, cache cleanup, memory release
- **AM-005a Preload Concurrency**: Test concurrent load handling, queue management
- **AM-005b GSM Orchestration**: Test scene switching on GSM state transitions

**Estimated test count**: ~60-80 unit tests

### Physics (5 stories — 3 Logic, 2 Integration)

**Test directory**: `tests/unit/physics/`

Physics wraps Havok API. Tests mock PhysicsBody/PhysicsAggregate objects.

- **PH-001 Core Skeleton**: Test pipeline slot registration, physics engine init, body management
- **PH-002 Arcade Grip**: Test grip calculation, speed model, cornering force
- **PH-003 Engine/Gears**: Test gear ratios, drag model, braking force, fuel consumption link
- **PH-004 Surface Handle**: Test off-track detection, kerb behavior, grip multiplier
- **PH-005 Lock/Pit/Events**: Test locked state, pit mode, external input handling

**Estimated test count**: ~70-90 unit tests

### Camera (10 stories — 3 Logic, 5 Integration, 1 Visual/Feel, 1 Config/Data)

**Test directory**: `tests/unit/camera/`

Camera wraps Babylon.js Camera API. Tests mock camera/scene objects.

- **CAM-001 Foundation**: Test CameraManager init, mode enum, camera creation
- **CAM-002 GSM Lifecycle**: Test camera switching on GSM state transitions
- **CAM-003 Cockpit**: Test FreeCamera setup, FOV, head bob parameters
- **CAM-004 Chase Occlusion**: Test FollowCamera setup, occlusion detection, recovery
- **CAM-005 Toggle**: Test cockpit/chase toggle, instant switch, state preservation
- **CAM-006 Speed FOV**: Test FOV shift formula, speed thresholds, clamping
- **CAM-007 Shake System**: Test shake trigger, decay, intensity, camera isolation
- **CAM-008 Drone Orbit**: Test ArcRotateCamera setup, orbit parameters, input clear
- **CAM-009 Head Bob** (Visual/Feel): Manual verification — head bob feels natural at speed
- **CAM-010 Config HMR** (Config/Data): Test config reload, value update, default fallback

**Estimated test count**: ~80-100 unit tests

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### DT-003: HTML Overlay (UI)

**Verification method**: Manual step-through
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: screenshot of overlay in action

Checklist:

- [x] Overlay renders on screen when dev key is pressed
- [ ] Tab navigation works (Config, Events, GSM, Snapshot, AI) — N/A: stories 004-008
- [ ] Config tree displays namespace hierarchy — N/A: story 004
- [ ] Event bus shows recent events with payloads — N/A: story 005
- [ ] GSM visualizer shows current state — N/A: story 006
- [ ] Snapshot panel shows hash comparison — N/A: story 007
- [x] Overlay can be toggled on/off without state loss

### CAM-009: Head Bob + Lateral Lean (Visual/Feel)

**Verification method**: Screenshot + lead sign-off
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: screenshot at 200+ km/h showing head bob and lean

Checklist:

- [ ] Head bob is visible at high speed (>150 km/h)
- [ ] Lateral lean is visible during cornering
- [ ] Bob/lean intensity scales with speed
- [ ] Effect is subtle, not motion-sickness-inducing
- [ ] Effect stops when car is stationary

### CAM-010: Camera Config HMR (Config/Data)

**Verification method**: Spot-check in-game values
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: config value change reflected in camera behavior

Checklist:

- [ ] Changing FOV shift value in config updates camera behavior
- [ ] Changing head bob amplitude updates visual effect
- [ ] Default values are applied when config key is missing
- [ ] HMR reload does not crash the camera system

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint:

1. Game launches without crash (Asset Manager two-scene setup works)
2. Telemetry data model creates valid data structures
3. Dev Tools overlay opens and displays correct information
4. Input polling captures keyboard/gamepad state
5. Physics engine initializes and processes ticks
6. Camera modes switch correctly (Grid → Cockpit → Chase → Drone)
7. All stories have passing automated unit tests (where applicable) and manual test evidence

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story   | Playtest Goal                            | Min Sessions | Target Player Type    |
| ------- | ---------------------------------------- | ------------ | --------------------- |
| CAM-009 | Does head bob feel natural at speed?     | 1            | experienced           |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-02-cam-009.md` and reviewed by lead-programmer before the story can be marked COMPLETE.

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI stories
- [ ] **100% coverage on all 4 metrics** (stmts/branches/functions/lines)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
